# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store application assets. Configure the bucket for public read access so our website can serve static files (images, CSS, JavaScript). Keep the template simple for quick deployment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 bucket for serving static website assets via CloudFront with secure access controls

Parameters:
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: app-static-assets
    Description: Prefix for the S3 bucket name
    AllowedPattern: ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9\-]*[a-z0-9]$
    ConstraintDescription: Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

  CloudFrontOAIId:
    Type: String
    Description: CloudFront Origin Access Identity ID for secure bucket access
    AllowedPattern: ^[A-Z0-9]+$
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CloudFront OAI ID

Resources:
  AssetsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub ${BucketNamePrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
            BucketKeyEnabled: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CleanupOldVersions
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: 30
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      CorsConfiguration:
        CorsRules:
          - AllowedHeaders:
              - '*'
            AllowedMethods:
              - GET
              - HEAD
            AllowedOrigins:
              - '*'
            MaxAge: 3600
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StaticAssets
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  AssetsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AssetsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudFrontOAIReadOnly
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::cloudfront:user/CloudFront Origin Access Identity ${CloudFrontOAIId}
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/*
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/*
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/*
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption: AES256
          - Sid: DenyDeleteActions
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:DeleteBucket
              - s3:DeleteBucketPolicy
            Resource: !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId

  AssetUploaderRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub ${BucketNamePrefix}-uploader-role
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AssetUploadPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowAssetManagement
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/*
              - Sid: DenyPolicyModification
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - s3:PutBucketPolicy
                  - s3:DeleteBucketPolicy
                  - s3:PutBucketAcl
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:PutBucketPublicAccessBlock
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/*

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 assets bucket
    Value: !Ref AssetsBucket

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 assets bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn

  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name for CloudFront origin configuration
    Value: !GetAtt AssetsBucket.RegionalDomainName

  UploaderRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM role for uploading assets
    Value: !GetAtt AssetUploaderRole.Arn
